programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: The town of Westport has commissioned a statue of a Minuteman to commemorate the Revolutionary War. The whole town is involved, from Fred who will serve as town crier to Ricky who will make the dedication speech.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: To celebrate the Mertzes' wedding anniversary, Fred and Ricky want to go to a prizefight, but the girls want to get dressed up and go to a nightclub. An argument ensues and Lucy threatens to find two other escorts if their husbands won't take them.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy decides Ricky's love is growing cold so she takes Ethel's advice she learned from a book, How to Keep the Honeymoon from Ending. Her attempt to dress up for breakfast doesn't yield any response from Ricky.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: One of the girls in Ricky's show quits, creating a vacancy which Lucy wants to fill. She goes down for an audition and can have the part provided she loses twelve ponds in four days to fit into the previous singer's size 12 outfit.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy is reading "The Mockingbird Murder Mystery" when Ethel reads her fortune and tells her death is near. Later she overhears a conversation between Ricky and his agent and she jumps to the wrong conclusion that he's trying to do away with her.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: When Ricky cuts off Lucy's allowance and charge accounts because of her careless spending, Lucy finds herself short of funds. Ethel has tickets to a radio quiz show that has a cash prize of $1,000.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Network television scouts are going to check out Ricky's band and Lucy tries to "get into the act" in order to be discovered as well. Of course Ricky will not hear of it.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy becomes interested in numerology and advises Ricky that it is a good day for him to make any deals he can. However, she soon realizes that she consulted the horoscope from yesterday's newspaper.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: When Ricky leaves his clothes around the living room, Lucy gets angry and divides the room in half so Ricky can be as messy as he likes - on his side!

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ricky brings home a $3,500 mink coat to be used in his nightclub act, and Lucy assumes it's her anniversary present. Trying to get the coat away from her becomes a problem because Lucy not only wears it while she does housework, she even sleeps in it.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ethel Mertz interprets a gossip column item to mean that Ricky is interested in one of the chorus girls in his nightclub. Ricky assures Lucy that it's just publicity.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy opens a telegram addressed to Ricky from the War Department ordering him to appear at the Army's Fort Dix. This letter plus the drills Ricky and Fred have been practicing in the living room convince the women that their husbands have been drafted.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy learns that Ricky needs a dancer for his Parisian nightclub act and is determined to get the part. Fred offers to teach her how to dance but Ethel arranges instead to have the nephew of the woman who runs the French laundry to give pointers.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ethel wants Ricky to headline a benefit for her women's club. Lucy will only try to arrange it if she is on the bill as well. After hearing Lucy's terrible singing voice, Ethel is less than eager, but eventually agrees.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy buys a costly dress, and when Ricky tells her to take it back or pay for it herself, she decides to get a job. She answers an ad for a babysitter and finds herself in charge of high-spirited twin boys who are to appear in an amateur contest.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy's neighbor Miss Lewis has a crush on Mr. Ritter, the local grocer but istoo shy to invite him to dinner. Trying to play Cupid, Lucy invites him for her but he gets the idea that Lucy has fallen for him. Apparently Mr. Ritter is fond of Lucy as well.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: In a deception planned to convince Ricky that she ought to be in his new nightclub act, Lucy pretends to have a nervous breakdown. She consults a book on abnormal psychology that reveals three complexes she assumes.

programme.title: I Love Lucy

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: The Mertzes enjoy an evening singing around the piano with the Ricardos in their apartment. When they retire for the night and Lucy and Ricky continue singing, Ethel phones them demanding quiet.

programme.desc: Ricky needs a ballet dancer and a burlesque comic for his club's new musical revue. Lucy wants the ballet gig and takes dance lessons from a strict instructor. Learning the disciplined art is much more difficult than she imagined.

programme.title: Cops en español
programme.desc: Un barrio tranquilo se interrumpe. Un hombre desafortunado trata de ocultar su culpabilidad al tirar unas prendas. Hay puñetazos cuando un dueño de tienda enfrenta a alguien que le robó.

programme.title: Cops en español
programme.desc: La dueña se sorprende porque un delincuente fugitivo se esconde en su tienda. Oficiales encuentran más que muebles en una furgoneta. Una mujer por tercera vez invade propiedad privada.

programme.title: Cops en español
programme.desc: Un sospechoso en propiedad privada hace preguntas en lugar de responderlas. Los policías descubren una gran cantidad de contrabando durante un retén. Un adicto viene a visitar y la policía ayuda.

programme.title: Cops en español
programme.desc: Un pasajero salta del carro en persecución. Un hombre ingenuo se ve en peligro cuando trata de ganar dinero fácil. Un oficial investiga a un hombre que reconoce caminando en una calle oscura.

programme.title: Cops en español
programme.desc: Un joven delata a su grupo que se pasea en autos robados. Un repartidor de pizza llama a la policía al robarle. Los agentes identifican un olor característico cuando detienen un automóvil sospechoso.

programme.title: Cops en español
programme.desc: Una madre con una orden judicial no logra evadir a la policía. Se detiene a un delincuente de tránsito habitual. Se reporta una pelea y los policías encuentran evidencia de una discusión sangrienta.

programme.title: Cops en español
programme.desc: Indigente lucha por su libertad. Un hombre y una mujer sospechosos llaman la atención de un oficial. Una pelea entre pareja llama la atención a una orden judicial pendiente.

programme.title: Cops en español
programme.desc: Un hombre intenta pelear con todo el vecindario. Un fugitivo está convencido de que la policía le dijo que se fuera en su bicicleta. Una mamá joven con problemas tiene una segunda oportunidad.

programme.title: Los nuevos detectives
programme.desc: Los asesinos a menudo ocultan los restos de sus víctimas para desviar la atención de sus crímenes. Los cuerpos pueden permanecer ocultos por años antes de ser descubiertos.

programme.title: Los nuevos detectives
programme.desc: Aproximadamente 1.8 millones de estadounidenses desaparecen cada año. Algunos son fugitivos que vuelven a casa, pero otros simplemente se esfuman. Sospechando juego sucio, los investigadores recurren a los forenses para encontrar a los desaparecidos.

programme.title: Los nuevos detectives
programme.desc: Saben tanto sobre el crimen como cualquier oficial, o cualquier criminal. Son los escritores de policiales y, a través de sus ojos, vemos el asesinato más asqueroso. Combinan las perspectivas de la aplicación de la ley, los delincuentes y el periodismo.

programme.title: Los nuevos detectives
programme.desc: Una niña que jugaba en el patio en Spokane, Washington, de repente desaparece. En San Luis, otra chica sale a visitar a una amiga y nunca llega. Los padres horrorizados temen que sus hijos hayan sido secuestrados o algo peor.

programme.desc: Laura's college class brings romantic pressure from the professor and a confrontation with Eliza Jane.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: A day of imaginative play and fun for Barney and his young friends is kicked off by the arrival of a variety of boxes from the "Enjoy-Your-Toys Company." Surprisingly, every box is empty!

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: Barney and his friends play hopscotch—with a twist. Whitney is learning about triangles at school, so Angela created Triangle Hopscotch to help reinforce "triangles."

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: A tea party planned by the children turns into a fun opportunity to reinforce lessons about good manners! Throughout the day, Baby Bop is given helpful advice.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: Every day with Barney is fun—but today is extra special. It's Barney's birthday!

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: Barney helps his young friends find good ways to express and deal with angry emotions.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: Angela is in the park to release her turtle after observing him with her classmates in school. Barney and the children discuss the meaning of in and out after observing the turtle going in and out of his shell.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: Barney, Baby Bop and the kids learn all about “on” and “off” by playing games together.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: The kids have put together a "Caboose Color Collection" which showcases the primary colors—red, yellow and blue. Barney and Baby Bop enjoy songs and games suggested by the colorful objects.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: The children learn about many different countries while experiencing an “International Fair” on the playground.

programme.title: Barney & Friends

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: Mario is trying to write his very own fairy tale. The children help by acting out some of their favorite fairy tales to give Mario some ideas.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: When Miss Jo loses her cat, Barney and the children spend the day helping her find it. Along the way, they learn all about cats.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: Barney helps Baby Bop and the children discover big and little things in the world around them. And by the end of the day, the kids have learned that big or little, they're all wonderful just the way they are!

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: Nick's homework is to find as many squares as he can. It's great fun when Barney and the kids help!

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: When Ben arrives too late to get a pony ride he must learn how to wait the hard way. He's always wanted a horse and now it looks as if he's missed his opportunity. Luckily, Barney takes him to Spain where they meet Regalo, a dancing horse!

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: Emma can't play with her friends because she has to complete a school project about her family. Before you know it, Barney brings Emma on a trip to Venice to learn more about her great granddad.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: Barney and the kids help Mr. Boyd prepare his dog Bingo for a trip to the veterinarian for a check, while learning lessons about caring for dogs at the same time. Meanwhile, BJ is searching for his missing baseball, which he suspects was buried by Bingo.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: While Barney has fun with his friends every day, there's something special about making a brand NEW friend! When Mr. Boyd's niece, Colleen visits the park, she's eager to make friends with the other kids...but being the "new kid" isn't easy.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: It's the day of the bike parade. But Nick has had a bike accident that leaves his bike in need of repair by Mr. Boyd. Barney helps Baby Bop and the children learn all about bicycles—and that they are a wonderful way to exercise and have fun.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: The kids are having a yard sale, getting rid of old toys, books and clothes. Kioko shows up holding a prized possession—a music box from Switzerland. By accident, Ben includes the music box in a cardboard box of yard sale items!

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: With a little Barney magic, the children experience the differences between day and night!

programme.title: Barney & Friends

programme.title: Barney & Friends

programme.title: Barney & Friends

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: Barney, BJ and the kids spend the day preparing for a performance for their friends in the park.

programme.title: Barney & Friends

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: To Law and the others' surprise, Luffy and the rest of the Straw Hats attack the giant torii gate in front of Onigashima. Meanwhile, Kaido and Orochi are having a big banquet on the island where Kaido's formidable subordinates are also called in.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Straw Hats and the samurai warriors finally reach Onigashima! Before they set out for the castle as they planned, the samurai warriors use surprising but determined tactics to cut off their retreat which leave the Straw Hats in shock.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Eustass Kid and his clan start heading for Kaido's castle head on waving Luffy off. Luffy and Zoro go after them to stop them from causing trouble, but they happen to step into Kaido's banquet.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy and Zoro each witness Kaido's subordinates waste food at the banquet and make fun of the poor people in the Land of Wano. Thinking of Otama, a small girl who liked red-bean soup so much, both Luffy and Zoro become infuriated and create turmoil.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: After making a scene at the Golden Festival, Luffy and Zoro try to get away, but Queen announces his subordinates that anyone who catches them will be rewarded with a position in the Tobi Roppo.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Haccha, a supergiant Number, joins in and the pursuit of Luffy and the others becomes even more intense!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy, Law, Kin'emon, and all the others are trying to infiltrate Kaido's castle from all sides. Meanwhile, Big Mom's children are climbing up the waterfall towards Onigashima, but this time, Marco the Phoenix appears from nowhere and stands in their way!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The furious Big Mom chases Brachio Tank driven by Chopper and Usopp, but they bravely fight back!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy runs into Ulti and Page One, members of the Tobi Roppo from the Animal Kingdom Pirates. Hearing that he aims to become the King of the Pirates, the brother and sister duo become infuriated and turn themselves into massive beasts.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Evading Ulti and Page One, strong members of the Tobi Roppo, Luffy tries to find out what Kaido's son Yamato's motive is. However, the two get in a fight. Taking Luffy's punishing attacks, Yamato remembers someone he fought against in the past.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Akazaya members who were on board Law's Polar Tang finally reach Onigashima and see someone who they didn't expect. Kaido's son Yamato starts telling his story to Luffy, shares his passion, and reveals what's behind his mask!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: At the back entrance of Onigashima, the Akazaya members try to get inside the gate, but they're blocked by their former colleague Kanjuro.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Kaido's plan to obtain the great treasure infuriates Orochi, but his unexpected violent move silences everyone. Meanwhile at the back entrance of Onigashima, Kikunojo squares off against Kanjuro and gets into an emotional fight with her former colleague.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Akazaya members start charging towards Kaido from the back of Onigashima. Meanwhile, at the Performance Floor, Kaido closes in on Momonosuke shivering in terror and asks him the ultimate question which will determine his fate.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Akazaya members deliver a crushing blow to Kaido. Luffy and Yamato try to back them up, but Ulti stands in their way and Big Mom spots Luffy. Meanwhile, Nami and Carrot free themselves from their enemies and move on to take back Zeus!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Animal Kingdom Pirates gasp with surprise to see thousands of samurai warriors coming into the castle. In his dragon form, Kaido goes outside to fight the Akazaya members under the moon/

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Shinobu tries to rescue the weakened Momonosuke but is found by King and attacked. On the other hand, Nami takes back Zeus from Big Mom and runs away but loses him again and gets chased by Zeus who is ordered to kill to her by Big Mom.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Franky faces Big Mom with the help of Robin and Jimbei, but the Numbers come interrupting their battle. One of them holds Brachio Tank with Usopp and Chopper inside in his hand. Meanwhile, Yamato finally meets his son Momonosuke.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: As the Minks struggle with a poor hand against the Gifters, Kin'emon tries to assist them, but Dogstorm and Cat Viper stop him and start fighting for the other Minks!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Who's-Who invites Drake and Hawkins to a plot to kill Queen. Meanwhile, the Straw Hats are facing two large monsters that remind them of the Giant who they once struggled to take down. As Luffy charges towards them, someone unexpected comes in to help.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Drake vows to fight alongside Luffy, but Zoro becomes skeptical and challenges him to a fight. Meanwhile, Usopp's practical joke pushes Nami into confronting Ulti, who is infuriated since her brother got attacked.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Queen uses a new version of the Plague Bullets which will turn the samurai into ogre-like monsters. Meanwhile, the Minks keep pushing the fight against the Gifters and drive Jack into a corner. However, Kaido stands up for his subordinate.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: While Luffy is hurrying to the rooftop and Yamato is trying to catch up to Momonosuke to protect him, the Akazaya members finally face off against Kaido.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Queen, the Lead Performer, blazes away at samurai on the Performance Floor with the special version of the Plague Rounds, which turns them into hideous ogres that corner Zoro and Drake

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: King orders his subordinates to go after Momonosuke. Shinobu tries to protect him, but they are cornered by one of the strong Lead Performers from the Animal Kingdom Pirates.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Yamato fights Sasaki and the Animal Kingdom Pirates Armored Division to protect Momonosuke. Meanwhile, Zoro tries to get rid of the Gifters who have turned into Ice Oni, but Queen starts a horrible game which involves the antibody for the virus.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Ulti and Page One of the Tobi Roppo chase Nami and Usopp, after being infuriated by their attack as well as Luffy's declaration of becoming the King of the Pirates. Cornered, Nami gives in and Ulti pushes her to say the unthinkable.

programme.title: The Ruins
programme.desc: "The Ruins" follows a group of friends who become entangled in a struggle for survival after visiting a remote archaeological dig in the Mexican jungle where they discover something deadly living among the ruins.

programme.title: Pandorum
programme.desc: Two crew members wake up on an abandoned spacecraft without knowing who they are, how long they've been asleep, or their mission. Soon after, they discover they're not alone, and the situation is more horrifying than they ever could have imagined.

programme.title: Zodiac
programme.desc: Based on the Robert Graysmith books about the real life notorious Zodiac, a serial killer who terrorized San Francisco with a string of seemingly random murders during the 1960s and 1970s.

programme.title: Civil War
programme.desc: An adrenaline-fueled thrill ride through a near-future fractured America balanced on the razor's edge. A group of journalists (led by Kirsten Dunst) must race through battlefields to the White House before DC falls.

programme.title: Nightcrawler
programme.desc: A freelance cameraman (Jake Gyllenhaal) goes to increasingly greater lengths to get shots of the most-lurid and disturbing crimes on the dark streets of Los Angeles.

programme.title: Vanilla Sky
programme.desc: Young and wealthy, David can have anything his heart desires. But his life seems incomplete. One night, David meets the woman of his dreams and believes he may have found the missing piece.

programme.title: Angels & Demons
programme.desc: Expert symbologist Robert Langdon (Tom Hanks) follows ancient clues on a heart-racing hunt through Rome to find the four Cardinals kidnapped by the deadly secret society, the Illuminati.

programme.title: Braveheart
programme.desc: William Wallace, a commoner, unites the 13th Century Scots in their battle to overthrow English rule.

programme.title: Gladiator
programme.desc: A man robbed of his name and his dignity strives to win them back, and gain the freedom of his people, in this epic historical drama from director Ridley Scott.

programme.title: Titanic
programme.desc: Leonardo DiCaprio and Oscar-nominee Kate Winslet light up the screen as Jack and Rose, the young lovers who find one another on the maiden voyage of the "unsinkable" R.M.S. Titanic.

programme.title: Grumpy Old Men
programme.desc: Jack Lemmon and Walter Matthau portray lifelong feuding neighbors making each day a hilarious game of revenge. But then voluptuous Ariel moves in nearby and their dormant hormones reignite in an all-out competition to win her favor.

programme.title: Almost Unsolved
programme.desc: A young woman is brutally murdered in her home and police are convinced they have let the suspect escape for good until decades later a new invention changes everything.

programme.title: Forensic Investigators
programme.desc: When armed robbers launched a surprise attack on security guards in the process of restocking two ATMs in January 2002, they did so in broad daylight along a busy shopping strip just minutes from the heart of Melbourne.

programme.title: Forensic Investigators
programme.desc: Patricia Byers and her partner of three years, John Asquith, were enjoying a romantic evening for two aboard the luxury cabin cruiser Misty Blue.

programme.title: Forensic Investigators
programme.desc: When Paul Snabel didn’t return home for over a week in November 1989, his flatmate became concerned and reported him missing.

programme.title: Forensic Investigators
programme.desc: On 29 April 1996, Le Anh Tuan was kidnapped by three men from his Melbourne home. In broad daylight, neighbours watched as he was bundled into the boot of a car. His captors later demanded a $400,000 ransom for his safe return.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: Dark secrets are the stock in trade of deadly women.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: Women are more often prey than predators but the exceptions are deadly women.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: The path towards revenge can sometimes lead to murder. It can be quick, fiery and violent.

programme.title: Fatal Crimes
programme.desc: An unsolved shooting in 2003 is linked to two similar murders, a decade later. Ballistics evidence links all three to an unusual bullet type - and even more unusual murder weapons.

programme.title: Fatal Crimes
programme.desc: Randy Stone is the sort of big-hearted, outgoing guy everybody likes. So how did he end up shot to death on the floor of his Independence, Missouri insurance office?

programme.title: Fatal Crimes
programme.desc: Wholesome wife and mother Susan Fassett is gunned down outside of her church as she leaves choir practice. Her police lieutenant husband's car is ID'd fleeing the scene.

programme.title: Fatal Crimes

programme.title: Killer Mysteries
programme.desc: A businessman by day transforms into a sadomasochistic by night. This veteran conman lures unsuspecting women with a web of lies and empty promises.

programme.title: Killer Mysteries
programme.desc: A look at the appearance of severed body parts in random locations across London, England.

programme.title: Killer Mysteries

programme.title: Pokémon the Series

programme.title: Pokémon the Series
programme.desc: A Team Rocket strike on Mossdeep City drags our heroes—plus the city's twin Gym Leaders—into a space-shuttle scheme!

programme.title: Pokémon the Series
programme.desc: Ash takes on the Mossdeep Gym, going up against two Gym Leaders at once!

programme.title: Pokémon the Series
programme.desc: After winning his seventh Gym badge, Ash can't stop bragging about his battle skills…until he runs into a member of the Elite Four!

programme.title: Pokémon the Series
programme.desc: In an island nature preserve, Ash and friends come face to face with several Pokémon thought to be extinct!

programme.title: Pokémon the Series
programme.desc: May competes in a Pokémon Contest, where another Coordinator tries to sabotage her performance!

programme.title: Pokémon the Series
programme.desc: When our heroes discover an enormous Poké Ball on an island, Team Rocket's meddling unleashes an ancient destructive force!

programme.title: Pokémon the Series
programme.desc: Ash and friends meet a talented Trainer who performs a ribbon dance with her Mawile…until Team Rocket gets in the way!

programme.title: Pokémon the Series
programme.desc: To help a local researcher, our heroes explore a massive underground labyrinth created by a group of Trapinch…and get into some trouble along the way!

programme.title: Pokémon the Series
programme.desc: An Absol appears to warn a village of danger, but the villagers think it's the one causing the trouble! Can our heroes clear up this misunderstanding?

programme.title: Pokémon the Series

programme.title: Pokémon the Series
programme.desc: Max finds an injured Ralts and tries to get it to a Pokémon Center, but its friends Gardevoir and Kirlia think our heroes are trying to steal it!

programme.title: Pokémon the Series
programme.desc: Ash gets ready for his final Gym battle in the Hoenn region: a Double Battle against Gym Leader Juan, who used to be a Pokémon Coordinator!

programme.title: Pokémon the Series
programme.desc: Ash and Juan battle it out in the Sootopolis Gym! Can Ash win his eighth Gym badge to qualify for the Hoenn League?

programme.desc: When May discovers that two of her Poké Balls are missing, she naturally assumes it's Team Rocket! But the culprit could be someone else entirely…

programme.desc: When Team Rocket interrupts a practice battle between May and her rival Drew, our heroes and their Pokémon have to sort out a big mix-up!

programme.title: Pokémon the Series
programme.desc: Our heroes are delayed by a herd of Donphan on their way to Pacifidlog Town! Can May make it onto the ferry in time for her final Pokémon Contest?

programme.title: Pokémon the Series
programme.desc: May enters the Pacifidlog Contest, where she goes up against rivals Joshua and Erica, plus a mysterious competitor known only as The Jester…

programme.title: Pokémon the Series

programme.title: Pokémon the Series

programme.title: Pokémon: Los campeones de la Liga Johto
programme.desc: Tras ganar su primera medalla de Gimnasio en Johto, Ash y sus amigos encuentran a un lindo Marill que no deja de llorar. Nada de lo que hacen nuestros héroes lo tranquiliza, y el ataque del Equipo Rocket de verdad no ayuda.

programme.title: Pokémon: Los campeones de la Liga Johto
programme.desc: El último invento del Equipo Rocket será un éxito… ¡hasta que Togepi y su nuevo amigo Sentret se lo llevan de paseo!

programme.title: Pokémon: Los campeones de la Liga Johto
programme.desc: Ash escucha de un lugar de entrenamiento para Charizard salvajes y decide que es el lugar para perfeccionar la fuerza de su Charizard. Pero las duras lecciones a aprender cambiarán la amistad de Ash y Charizard para siempre.

programme.title: Pokémon: Los campeones de la Liga Johto
programme.desc: En su camino hacia el Gimnasio Azalea, nuestros héroes descubren un festival de Sunflora en un pueblo cercano y conocen a un Entrenador cuya Sunflora está demasiado triste para competir. ¿Podrán Ash y sus amigos alegrarla?

programme.title: Pokémon: Los campeones de la Liga Johto
programme.desc: A Ash se le está dificultando hacer que Chikorita lo obedezca, y la Enfermera Joy cree que se debe a celos por la amistad de Ash con Pikachu. ¿Podrá Ash probarle a Chikorita lo mucho que significa para él?

programme.title: Pokémon: Los campeones de la Liga Johto
programme.desc: Nuestros héroes conocen a un Entrenador cuyos Hoppip pueden predecir el clima. Pero dos tormentas se acercan en el horizonte... ¡Y una de ellas se llama "Equipo Rocket"!

programme.title: Pokémon: Los campeones de la Liga Johto
programme.desc: El legendario superhéroe Gligarman envejece y considera colgar su capa. Cuando Ash y sus amigos vagan por el pueblo, traen consigo un reto que podría ser su batalla final: ¡el Equipo Rocket!

programme.title: Pokémon: Los campeones de la Liga Johto
programme.desc: Cuando una revoltosa horda de Mareep arruina sus planes de almuerzo, nuestros héroes deciden ayudar a su tímido pastor, justo a tiempo para competir en un festival de batalla local.

programme.title: Pokémon: Los campeones de la Liga Johto
programme.desc: Cuando un estudiante de un centro de entrenamiento Pokémon pierde su interés en las batallas Pokémon y prefiere construir una gran base de datos Pokémon, Ash debe convencerlo de que las batallas son más que probabilidad.

programme.title: Pokémon: Los campeones de la Liga Johto
programme.desc: Cuando Ash encuentra un Cyndaquil salvaje, está ansioso por atraparlo… ¡pero pueden apostar que no es el único!

programme.title: Pokémon: Los campeones de la Liga Johto
programme.desc: Tras llegar a Pueblo Azalea, Ash descuidadamente provoca a sus residentes, quienes adoran a SlowPoké. Y las cosas sólo empeoran cuando llega el Equipo Rocket, tratando de robar hasta al último SlowPoké. ¿Qué podrá hacer Ash?

programme.title: Pokémon: Los campeones de la Liga Johto
programme.desc: Tal como prometió al Profesor Oak, Ash entrega la misteriosa Bola GS a un renovado experto en Pokébolas. Pero el fruto de su trabajo casi se arruina cuando el Equipo Rocket aparece en escena.

programme.title: Pokémon: Los campeones de la Liga Johto
programme.desc: Ash por fin llega al Gimnasio Azalea, pero Cyndaquil no tiene la energía para derrotar al Líder de Gimnasio. Conforme la batalla se enciende, Ash debe esforzarse al máximo para derrotar al poderoso Pokémon tipo Insecto.

programme.title: Pokémon: Los campeones de la Liga Johto
programme.desc: Un Entrenador joven y poco experimentado asustó a su propio Farfetch'd. Nuestros héroes están felices de ayudarlo, pero tendrán que hallarlo antes que el Equipo Rocket.

programme.title: Pokémon: Los campeones de la Liga Johto
programme.desc: En un festival anual de intercambio Pokémon, un joven Entrenador busca un buen cambio por su Wobbuffet. El trío del Equipo Rocket también busca oportunidades, pero ambos grupos de Entrenadores obtienen más de lo que pidieron.

programme.title: Pokémon: Los campeones de la Liga Johto
programme.desc: Una inesperada competencia de apaga incendios Pokémon reúne a nuestros héroes con algunos viejos amigos, el escuadrón Squirtle! pero necesitan desesperadamente a un líder, así que Ash y Squirtle se reintegran a sus filas.

programme.title: Pokémon: Los campeones de la Liga Johto
programme.desc: Cuando se encuentran con una guardería para Wooper y una emergencia requiere del maestro, nuestros héroes van al rescate. Pero, como siempre, el Equipo Rocket está a la vuelta de la esquina, y no trama nada bueno…

programme.title: Pokémon: Los campeones de la Liga Johto
programme.desc: En su camino hacia ciudad Caña Dorada, nuestros héroes se ven obligados a atravesar un túnel resguardado por un furioso Onix. Para hacer las cosas más difíciles, el equipo Rocket, Snubbull y Jigglypuff llegan de visita…

programme.title: Pokémon: Los campeones de la Liga Johto
programme.desc: Siguiendo una serie de misteriosos robos, nuestros héroes descubren a unos Houndour luchando por sobrevivir en la naturaleza. Para ayudar a estos Pokémon ladrones a reformarse, Ash y sus amigos tendrán que ganarse su confianza.

programme.title: Pokémon: Los campeones de la Liga Johto
programme.desc: La rivalidad entre Ash y Misty se reaviva cuando ambos tratan de capturar a Totodile a la vez. Como no saben cuál Pokébola lo capturó, tendrán una batalla para decidir quién será el nuevo Entrenador de Totodile.

programme.title: Pokémon: Los campeones de la Liga Johto
programme.desc: Cuando Ash oye de un entrenador virtualmente invencible, quiere ir a retarlo. Pero el Vulpix de Brock y el Cyndaquil de Ash reciben una paliza de su Skarmory, ¡a pesar de su ventaja de tipo! ¿Cómo logrará Ash derrotarlo?

programme.title: Pokémon: Los campeones de la Liga Johto
programme.desc: El Totodile de Ash se enamora de un Azumarill, que es la artista estrella de un circo Pokémon. Cuando el Equipo Rocket llega a robar el espectáculo, el corazón de Azumarill no será la única cosa que Totodile deba ganar.

programme.title: Pokémon: Los campeones de la Liga Johto
programme.desc: Ash tiene la vista puesta en un raro Noctowl de un color inusual, pero este astuto Pokémon usa repetidamente Hipnosis para engañarlo. ¿Podrá Ash capturar a este Noctowl dormilón?

programme.title: Pokémon: Los campeones de la Liga Johto
programme.desc: Un ataque sorpresa de un grupo de Ursaring hace que nuestros héroes y el Equipo Rocket busquen refugio. En el caos, los grupos se separan, y las poco entusiasmadas parejas tienen que trabajar juntas. Pero, ¿por cuánto tiempo?

programme.title: Pokémon: Los campeones de la Liga Johto
programme.desc: Tras una advertencia en el bosque sobre un travieso Pokémon tipo Fantasma, nuestros héroes llegan a un pueblo donde todos usan tipos Psíquico para repelerlos. Pronto llegan temibles noticias: ¡un Gengar gigante anda suelto!

programme.title: Pokémon: Los campeones de la Liga Johto
programme.desc: Una repentina moda en la adivinación Pokémon resulta ser un plan para robar a los Pokémon de los Entrenadores locales. Pero esta vez Jessie, James y Meowth no son los responsables. ¿Quiénes son estos villanos?

programme.title: Pokémon: ¡Yo te elijo!
programme.desc: ¡Ash Ketchum, un niño de diez años de Pueblo Paleta, finalmente tiene la edad para recibir a su primer Pokémon! Sin embargo, se queda dormido y el único Pokémon restante en el laboratorio del profesor Oak es un terco Pikachu.

programme.title: Pokémon: ¡Yo te elijo!
programme.desc: Ash corre hacia Ciudad Viridian con su herido Pikachu, ahí se encuentra con Jessie, James, y Meowth del Equipo Rocket, así como con Misty, quien está molesta porque Ash descompuso su bicicleta.

programme.title: Pokémon: ¡Yo te elijo!
programme.desc: ¡Ash descubre y atrapa a su primer Pokémon! Aunque está emocionada, Misty siente repugnancia por su nuevo amigo Pokémon tipo insecto.

programme.title: Pokémon: ¡Yo te elijo!
programme.desc: ¡Un furioso enjambre de Beedrill ataca a Ash y a Samurái a la mitad de un duelo de Metapod! Ash escapa, dejando atrás a su Metapod, quien está molesto con él por abandonarlo.

programme.title: Pokémon: ¡Yo te elijo!
programme.desc: Ash desafía al líder de gimnasio de Ciudad Plateada, Brock, pero ni siquiera Pikachu tiene oportunidad contra los Pokémon tipo roca de Brock. Con la ayuda del misterioso Flint, Ash entrenará duro antes de la revancha.

programme.title: Pokémon: ¡Yo te elijo!
programme.desc: Un científico guía a Ash y a sus a amigos a las profundidades de Mr. Moon para encontrar la famosa piedra lunar, la cual se dice tiene el poder de incrementar el poder de los Pokémon.

programme.title: Aerial America
programme.desc: Enjoy this soaring tour through Kansas, the Sunflower State.

programme.title: Aerial America
programme.desc: Discover Michigan's diverse history and its visionaries who built empires, started unions, and helped win a World War.

programme.title: Aerial America
programme.desc: Experience all sides of Washington State, from thousands of feet in the air.

programme.title: Chasing Monsters
programme.desc: Stranded on a deserted island off the west coast of Panama, Cyril and his team are in survival mode. Cyril has come to catch a huge Dienton, a large predator with huge teeth.

programme.title: Chasing Monsters
programme.desc: Between the unpredictable hippos and massive man-eating crocodiles of Gabon, Central Africa, Cyril must remain on high alert especially from his small tippy dugout.

programme.title: Chasing Monsters
programme.desc: Swept away in the ice-cold rapids in Northern Canada, Cyril is on the verge of hypothermia. He is in the northern reaches of the Cree First Nations territory to catch a mythical predator; a ferocious fish referred to as the freshwater wolf.

programme.title: Chasing Monsters
programme.desc: After finding out their boat was stolen, Cyril and his crew trek through the dense Amazon jungle and tread through waters where piranhas, caimans, and anacondas prowl on the hunt.

programme.title: Chasing Monsters
programme.desc: Cyril is on a mission to catch a brutal and fearless predator capable of ramming sharks to death. Waist deep in shark waters, Cyril gets relentlessly beaten by violent waves while casting his line from Christmas Island.

programme.title: Mountain Men
programme.desc: Tom takes on the Snake; Marty's new opportunity goes up in smoke and Eustace takes a hard fall that puts him out of commission.

programme.title: Mountain Men
programme.desc: Eustace struggles to accept the reality of his injuries; Marty scrambles to recover from a costly blow and Tom finally makes a breakthrough.

programme.title: Mountain Men
programme.desc: Marty begins an epic overland journey into the Alaskan bush; Morgan clashes with a ravenous grizzly bear.

programme.title: Mountain Men
programme.desc: Tom hits the rocks with only weeks of winter left to go; Morgan seeks protection from the bears and Jason fires up the forge.

programme.title: Mountain Men
programme.desc: The river deals Tom's season a fatal blow; Marty fights the ice to make it home and Jason battles a deadline to deliver for his family.

programme.title: Dangerous Waters
programme.desc: An Arctic blizzard howls down on the crew. The men try to convince the local hunters and trappers to help them haul fuel North. Ice reports show an advancing ice cap. Freezing spray blanket the crew.

programme.title: Dangerous Waters
programme.desc: Freezing spray covers the men. In the black of the Arctic night Steven’s watercraft sinks. The weather report looks grim. High winds almost capsize the fuel boat. The Whalers boat goes adrift.

programme.title: Dangerous Waters
programme.desc: For the first time this season the crew begin seeing Polar Bears roaming the frozen tundra. The weather continues to build and Steven has to make a decision on the fate of his watercraft.

programme.title: Dangerous Waters
programme.desc: Steven’s watercraft continues to sink. The expedition takes refuge on a deserted, frozen beach. It’s seal for lunch! The Whaling boat captain gets a funny feeling and changes everything for the expedition.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Northern Treasures
programme.desc: Bogart sets out to make an “extreme locker buying” video at an auction in North Toronto with cameras on his and Paul's heads. Ursula looks even more glamorous, Rick and Cindy get their groom on, and Roy scores a date with Olympian Elizabeth Manley.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Northern Treasures
programme.desc: Roy hires impersonators of the buyers at an auction. Paul and Bogart bond as they evade them. Rick and Cindy keep searching lockers and former NHL player Jim Thomson helps them find The Great One. Roy and Ursula's friendship blooms.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Northern Treasures
programme.desc: For the professional bidders, Aurora is a symphony of minor letdowns and major scores.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Northern Treasures
programme.desc: In Orangeville Rick and Cindy rock it, Paul and Bogart blow it, and Ursula goes bid crazy.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Northern Treasures
programme.desc: Brampton is a series of twists and turnarounds, where every locker contains a surprise package containing more - and less – than meets the eye.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Northern Treasures
programme.desc: It’s round robin mind-games when Ursula outsmarts Roy…who outsmarts Cindy…who outsmarts Paul and Bogart, who not so smartly make a bad decision.

programme.title: Extreme Salvage Squad
programme.desc: Team Salvage face-offs against The Mud Monster and races to retrieve a sunken vessel before the boat’s owners are slapped with a massive fine.

programme.title: Extreme Salvage Squad

programme.title: The Curse of Oak Island
programme.desc: The Oak Island mystery has lured generations of treasure hunters. In this one-hour special, we revisit the families that have been a part of Oak Island's history for more than two centuries.

programme.title: The Curse of Oak Island
programme.desc: It's the season finale and the moment of truth for the fellowship of the dig, as the guys are faced with the burning question: quit or continue?

programme.title: The Curse of Oak Island
programme.desc: Rick, Marty and the team return to Oak Island follow up on last year's amazing discoveries, and double down on their efforts to locate the elusive Oak Island Money Pit.

programme.title: The Curse of Oak Island
programme.desc: Brothers Rick and Marty Lagina begin the biggest and most expensive operation ever undertaken in the 223 year long treasure hunt. And after years of searching, the brotherhood finally strikes gold.

programme.title: The Curse of Oak Island
programme.desc: Armed with new evidence suggesting a ship is buried in the swamp, Rick, Marty and the team return to Oak Island determined to honor Dan's legacy.

programme.title: Auction Hunters

programme.title: Auction Hunters

programme.title: Auction Hunters

programme.desc: The Enterprise crew investigates the disappearance of a ship's crew on a planet that is a modern version of the Roman Empire.

programme.desc: The crew of the Enterprise pursues a mysterious woman who has abducted Spock's brain.

programme.desc: Captain Kirk becomes increasingly erratic and orders the Enterprise into Romulan space. Here, the ship is captured by a beautiful Romulan commander.

programme.desc: Kirk loses his memory and is proclaimed a God while trapped on a planet whose inhabitants are descended from Northwestern Native Americans.

programme.desc: The Enterprise reaches a Federation colony where the adults have all killed themselves but the children play without care.

programme.desc: Miranda Jones, a telepath who studied mental disciplines on Vulcan, arrives with Ambassador Kolos, a Medusan.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation

programme.desc: Tuvok's investigation of a series of mysterious attacks aboard Voyager leads him to a most unlikely suspect: himself.

programme.desc: The Doctor is forced to work on an alien ship where patients' care is determined by their social status instead of medical need.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager

programme.title: Stargate Universe
programme.desc: After secretly contacting Homeworld Command, Dr. Rush (Robert Carlyle) claims that he has been placed in charge by Gen. O’Neill (Richard Dean Anderson) and that there is no hope of returning to Earth. But his assertions are soon questioned.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: Embattled and under siege, SG-1 attempts to escape a Goa'uld search and destroy mission bent on finding them and the secret crystal they carry. Meanwhile, the balance of life is threatened by the reappearance of the evil System Lord Anubis.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: As an asteroid hurtles toward Earth, SG-1 uses an abandoned Goa'uld ship as a launch pad for a mega-bomb designed to destroy the rock before impact. But when SGC loses the ship's signal, it's feared that the team is dead and that Earth is in peril.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: K'tano, former First Prime of the late Imhotep, is now the leader of a powerful Jaffa rebellion. SG-1 visits his stronghold in hopes of securing an alliance. But O'Neill soon learns that this strategic partnership may well come at a heavy price.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: A dormant female android discovered on a barren planet is transported back to Earth for study. On reactivation, she exhibits a childlike innocence. But soon, SG-1 discovers that this seemingly innocent being may hold a dangerous secret.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: Col. O'Neill (Richard Dean Anderson) must enlist the aid of a couple of convicted felons in a bid to save a planet from the Goa'uld. With an attack looming, an entire world's salvation rests in the hands of SG-1 and two former NID operatives.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: Exposed to a lethal dose of radiation, Jackson has just hours to live. SG-1 tries everything in its power to save him, but as the hours tick away, Jackson's spirit meets with each member individually to discuss his next mission: life after death.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: Still dealing with the death of one of their own, SG-1 must put its mourning aside in order to confront the warlord Anubis—who has captured the Asgard leader Thor so he can extract the secrets of their ancient technology for universal domination.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: The SG-1 team faces two potential disasters light years apart as an energy build-up in the Stargate threatens to destroy Earth, and Teal'c (Christopher Judge) returns home to find his wife dead, his son estranged and his planet under attack.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: As Teal'c and his son battle to save Earth, O'Neill pilots the X-3, a newly designed interstellar spacecraft that will carry the Stargate far away from Earth so it can explode harmlessly in deep space. But how will SG-1 operate without the Stargate?

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: The SG-1 team investigates an abandoned Goa'uld ship orbiting the Earth. While they try to salvage the ship, saboteurs attack and the vessel plummets to Earth, deep into the ocean, with O'Neill and his crew trapped inside…and time running out.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: An alien that might predate human evolution by 50 million years is discovered in Antarctica and may be part of the race that invented the Stargate. After SG-1 manages to thaw her back to life, they discover she may be the source of a deadly virus.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: When a scientist working on stem cell research disappears, Carter, Teal'c and Quinn investigate and discover that the scientist's town is infested with Goa'uld who can only control the citizens by night. Will Carter, Teal'c and Quinn be taken over?

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: Jackson and McKay have reactivated the Attero device, an ancient machine designed to annihilate the Wraith. In doing so, they discover the reason the device was ultimately abandoned… Meanwhile, Todd continues to hold the Daedalus crew captive.

programme.title: Danny Phantom
programme.desc: Dash is assigned as Danny's "fitness buddy" to help him prepare for the Fitness Test at school.

programme.title: Danny Phantom
programme.desc: Sam enters a beauty pageant, which she detests, to make a statement about individuality but discovers instead that it's organizer is the Dragon Ghost!

programme.title: Danny Phantom
programme.desc: On a field trip everyone notices Tucker bears a striking resemblance to an egyptian pharaoh and after he looks in a ghostly mirror, his minion, Hotep Ra, comes to life.

programme.title: Danny Phantom
programme.desc: After Vlad sends three ghosts to Amity Park to battle Danny Phantom, we find out that he's working on his creepiest project yet: a clone of Danny Phantom.

programme.title: Danny Phantom
programme.desc: Danny won't admit his jealousy of Sam's new crush, Gregor. Instead he convinces himself that Gregor is an undercover operative for the Guys in White.

programme.title: Danny Phantom
programme.desc: Vlad forces Danny to get Clockwork's help to travel back in time in order to cure a case of ecto acne that he contracted after a lab accident in college.

programme.title: Danny Phantom
programme.desc: Danny and Vlad's game of revenge against each other begins with childish pranks, and, unfortunately for Danny, ends when Vlad decides to run for mayor of Amity Park!

programme.title: Danny Phantom
programme.desc: Danny helps pull a thorn out of an abominable snowman-like creature, who presides over the chilliest area of the ghost zone.

programme.title: Danny Phantom
programme.desc: Kitty, Ember, and Penelope Spectra are sick of the ghost-men in their lives, so they decide they're going to do something about it, by making all the men of Amity Park disappear.

programme.title: Danny Phantom
programme.desc: Amity Park is in the midst of a drought and Mayor Vlad, eager to score points, releases Vortex, the weather ghost, to make it rain.

programme.title: Danny Phantom
programme.desc: There's a new ghost in town. Amorpho, who can become anyone he sees, decides to switch with Danny, but when their powers collide it makes a mess of things!

programme.title: Danny Phantom
programme.desc: Undergrowth, the ghost of all things plant-like, has taken over Amity Park and turned everyone into plants.

programme.title: Danny Phantom
programme.desc: The Guys in White have finally caught on. They offer Jack and Maddie millions for FentonWorks.

programme.title: Danny Phantom
programme.desc: The Box Ghost is tired of being unappreciated as a terrifying ghost. Frustrated, he turns to the box belonging to Pandora, and every time he opens it he unleashes a new evil on the town!

programme.title: Danny Phantom
programme.desc: It's a whole new world for Danny Fenton – he's getting A's, he's the quarterback of the football team, he and Tucker are best pals with Dash, and Sam is his girlfriend. What? Turns out it's all a dream!

programme.title: Danny Phantom
programme.desc: Danny, Sam and Tucker go camping in a creepy, run-down dump. Before everyone can adjust to their surroundings, Mikey runs in claiming a monster in the woods snatched his friend!

programme.title: Danny Phantom
programme.desc: Danielle Phantom is back! Only this time, she's being hunted by Valerie, whose been tricked by Vlad Masters into thinking the ghost girl is evil.

programme.title: Danny Phantom
programme.desc: When Danny's friend Sam converts the school cafeteria to a recycled veggie menu, Danny must spring into action to thwart an angry Lunch Lady Ghost, who's serving up a heaping helping of the "3 M's": Mayhem, malice, and meat!

programme.title: Danny Phantom
programme.desc: When Danny's after-school ghost activities cause his already mediocre grades to slip, he calls upon his friends Sam and Tucker to help him efficiently manage his time.

programme.title: Danny Phantom
programme.desc: Danny discovers that he has the ghostly power to "overshadow" and inhabit the bodies of others - which comes in handy when his dad, Jack, is called in for a conference.

programme.title: Danny Phantom

programme.title: Danny Phantom
programme.desc: After some run-ins with Dash, the school bully, Danny uses his powers to get revenge and triggers the ghost of Poindexter, a kid who haunts his locker to this day.

programme.title: Danny Phantom

programme.title: Danny Phantom
programme.desc: Danny meets his evil opposite in Vlad Plasmius - a childhood rival of his father that also got ghost powers in an accident.

programme.title: Danny Phantom
programme.desc: Danny thinks he's going to cause his parents to split up when he knocks Jack's anniversary gift into the ghost zone. Desperate to retrieve it, he dives into this ghostly dimension where he runs afoul of Walker: The Ghost Warden of a Ghost Jail.

programme.title: Danny Phantom

programme.title: Los herederos del monte

programme.title: Los herederos del monte
programme.desc: Julieta manipula a todos con su enfermedad. La quimioterapia hace que ella se altere, empuja a Paula y escapa. Todos la buscan. Juan se hace una prueba de ADN con la saliva de Pablo. Adela llegará pronto a la hacienda la Arboleda.

programme.title: Los herederos del monte
programme.desc: Con el resultado del ADN, Juan sabe que Pablo es su verdadero padre. Paula se hace un examen de embarazo. José sigue a Gaspar, mientras lleva a Simón con Beatriz. Los hermanos discuten. Julieta le hace jurar a Juan que nunca la dejará.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Antonia interroga al pequeño David para saber quién es su padre. Además, quiere investigar si el Tigre ha estado robando oro de su mina. Fernando tiene una horrible pesadilla en la que ve a su madre, la Patrona, asesinando a su padre, Marcos Beltrán.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Irene y Alejandro hacen el amor, mientras que Gabriela sueña que disfruta de una noche de pasión con su patrón. Ante las acusaciones de Antonia, la minera defiende con entereza a su padre. Fernando sigue atormentado y busca el consuelo de su madre.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Los hermanos Beltrán se mueren por estar cerca de Gabriela. Alejandro la invita a cenar. Al regresar a casa, no aguanta las ganas y la besa. Fernando no soporta verlos juntos, habla con su madre y le confiesa que él fue quien violó a Gabriela.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: El beso de Alejandro despierta los traumas de Gabriela. Antonia se da cuenta de que David podría ser su nieto. Alejandro sorprende a Gabriela pidiéndole matrimonio. El Tigre rechaza el soborno de Antonia. Confirman que hay oro en el Chamuco.

programme.title: Pasion de Gavilanes (LAS)

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Uncle Fester incinerates the family's stuffed bear with his flamethrower, Morticia reports the accident to the insurance company. Mr. Henson the head of the company, sends his assistant, Mr. Digby, to handle the case.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch suffers from unrequited love over Tiny Trivia (guest star Diane Jergens), Morticia's visiting school chum who only has eyes for show business. The entire family decides to try to turn their stolid butler into a new personality.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Ophelia laments that she has been jilted, Morticia suggests a career as an alternative to marriage. She tries chemistry first (with explosive results) then turns to operatic singing. Cousin Itt is summoned to coach her to stardom.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez decide to keep Wednesday and Pugsley home from school after Morticia sees the fairy tales they have to read. When the truant officer comes to investigate, he is shocked at what he finds.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia calls a psychiatrist after she fears Pugsley is becoming normal after he abandons his pet octopus for a puppy and is seen wearing a Boy Scout uniform, playing with a baseball bat, and helping an old lady cross the street.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester, who has become lonely, convinces Gomez and Morticia that it is time for him to find a bride. He decides to put an ad in the newspaper, looking for love. But things go awry when a door-to-door saleswoman comes by.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Election fever grips the Addams household, as Gomez (John Astin) supports the council candidate whose campaign promise is to drain the town's disgusting bogs. Morticia (Carolyn Jones), who likes "the lovely bogs," labels the candidate an extremist.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Pugsley and Wednesday start a row at a party when their gift of a tarantula upsets Harold, the birthday boy. Harold's parents insist that the Addams children lack breeding and, therefore, are no longer allowed to play with their son.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: After Pugsley befriends Gorgo, a circus gorilla, Gorgo decides to follow Pugsley and Gomez home, where is accepted as one of the family. But Gorgo gives Morticia's tea guests, the Ladies League members, quite a shock.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: A pair of bank robbers are welcomed as Halloween trick-or-treaters by Morticia and Gomez. The creepy atmosphere of the house, Morticia's smoldering holiday punch, and Lurch's ominous presence impel the crooks to abandon their plans.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Lionel Barker, a former suitor of Morticia's, shows up, Gomez is jealous. But he's soon calmed when he learns that Barker is after Mildred, the new maid. The Addamses then discover that Barker is a con man--after Mildred's money, not her love.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Newlyweds move in next door. But the honeymoon loses its tranquility when Uncle Fester enters their house through a tunnel and they flee in terror at the sight of Lurch, Grandmama sharpening her ax, and Morticia and Gomez bathing the octopus.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: The family faces a crisis when Wednesday packs her spider and runs away (after being scolded for playing with Uncle Fester's TNT). When they try to file a missing person report, a detective is anxious to retire early due to their story.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Official visitors from an unfriendly nation receive the shock of their lives when they decide to exploit the Addams Family as an average uncultured family. The visitors are shaken up by Morticia's carnivorous plants among other things.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia's cousin, Melancholia, wants to marry Clarence P. Harvey after most of her marital prospects have joined the Foreign Legion. Clarence recoils when Melancholia puts on a campaign to win him, backed by Morticia, Gomez and Clarence's boss.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch becomes a veritable gazelle when he takes dancing lessons at Gomez and Morticia's suggestion after he admits to being a wallflower at social functions. Each member of the Addams Family teaches Lurch a different step.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Grandmama's paintings leave an art critic speechless, so Gomez sends for his friend, Sam Picasso, to teach Grandmama to paint in the abstract. The starving artist ignores Grandmama's and Morticia's work as he eats and paints.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Rockland Cartright III is a beatnik who crashes his motorbike into a tree and recuperates at the Addams house. Each regards the other as an oddity, although the family learns to appreciate certain aspects of Rockland's life.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Mr. Briggs, the postman, is hired by the government to do undercover work in the Addams house. While pretending to be a stamp collector, he investigates rumors that coded radio messages are being sent from the house.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch's tiny fire-eating mother visits and demands that Lurch's employers wait on her boy hand-and-foot after Lurch leads her to believe that it's his house. Lurch revels in the unexpected attention he gets from Morticia and Gomez.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester's electrical output fails abruptly. Should they call a doctor or an electrician to bring Fester back? Morticia prescribes a bowl of porcupine mold, and both she and Gomez agree that long exposure to moon rays would be beneficial.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: The family would like to vacation on the moon, but the billion-dollar travel cost is slightly prohibitive. Uncle Fester volunteers $21.13 and Morticia, using Gomez's new supercomputer, suggests placing a $2,000 bet on the daily double horse race.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Cousin Itt is advocated as curator of the local zoo. Gomez uses his influence with Park Commissioner Fisk (guest star Alan Reed) to promote Itt for the job, but the zookeepers are convinced the Addamses' cousin should be confined to a cage.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Grandmama (Blossom Rock) is hauled off to jail for setting up a fortune-telling booth in the Addamses' living room. Gomez (John Astin) volunteers to act as attorney, and the court session becomes a shambles.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Gomez (John Astin) loses his memory after hitting his head; he fails to recognize Morticia (Carolyn Jones) and says the house looks like a condemned museum. The Addamses take turns hitting Gomez on the head trying to help him regain his memory.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Thing disappears from his box. Failing to find a single trace of Thing, Gomez (John Astin) conducts an investigation--with all members of the household under suspicion. Also starring Carolyn Jones, Jackie Coogan, and Ted Cassidy.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester applies for a job as an insurance salesman with the same company which is threatening to cancel the Addamses' policy (because Fester keeps blowing things up). Fester convinces the company interviewer that he is qualified for the job.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: The Brady boys arrive at the cave to return the idol to the burial site, only to be held prisoners by an angry archaeologist who lays claim to the cave and believes that they stole the idol.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: Marcia is apprehensive about her first day of high school, so Mike asks Greg to help break the ice for her. Meanwhile, Peter tries to make a working volcano for the Science Club.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: Peter has a crush on Jan's new friend but every plan to impress her backfires. Inspired by "Cyrano de Bergerac", he launches a final plan to win her over with Greg's help but it also backfires when she falls for Greg instead.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: The boys try to spook the girls in the middle of the night with a ghost, so they try to get revenge by giving them a taste of their own medicine. But after Alice criticizes them for being so scared, the kids collectively have a new target.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: Jan feels disrespected and ignored by her brothers and sisters, so she tells everyone that she wishes she was an only child. Meanwhile, Carol and Alice have a competition over who can cook the best strawberry preserves.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: Mike thinks Greg wants to be an architect after reading Greg's school essay, but Greg doesn't want to hurt Mike's feelings and tell him the truth. Meanwhile, the other Brady kids also begin thinking about their future careers.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: The kids give Alice the cold shoulder after they think she has broken their trust, so Alice decides to leave her job as housekeeper. However, the kids soon regret the decision after the new housekeeper teaches them a lesson.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: Marcia thinks that a girl who is suddenly interested in Greg is actually using him so that Greg will vote for her as head cheerleader--over Marcia.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: Peter tries out for the role of George Washington in a school play, but gets the role of Benedict Arnold instead. But he then wants to quit the play altogether when his classmates start branding him as a "traitor."

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: Marcia has a crush on her new dentist, which only intensifies when she mistakes an opportunity to babysit for him as a date with him to the ballet.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: Bobby doesn't want to be safety monitor for his class because his classmates now hate him. However, he soon abuses his power and begins reporting on his family when they break house rules. Meanwhile, the family salvages an old sailboat.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: Bobby becomes obsessed with Jesse James. Mike and Carol don't approve of his new hero, and try to find a way to convince him that James was nothing but a "mean, dirty killer."

programme.title: The Brady Bunch

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: Peter gets a job at the bike shop, but he is fired after three days. He doesn't want to tell his parents the bad news, because he told the family he might be getting a promotion to salesman the day he got fired.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: Cindy loses her mom's earrings after playing with them, and "detective" Peter Brady tries to solve the mystery. But when Carol wants the earrings for a costume ball and they're still not found, the entire family tries to crack the case.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: The Brady girls try to play matchmaker between Carol's free-spirited grandmother and stick-in-the-mud Grandpa Brady.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Explosives Investigations: The crime lab is the place where science meets murder. In New York State, Eleanor Fowler opened a small package, which as mailed to her home. When she lifted the lid the box exploded killing her instantly.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: At a crime scene, anything left behind or seemingly out of place is considered a clue. But a fire can extinguish everything in its path –challenging forensic investigators at every turn and making each arson a trial by fire.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Approximately 1.8 million Americans are reported missing each year. Some are runaways who find their way home, but others simply disappear. When foul play is suspected, investigators turn to forensics to find the missing.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: When abduction turns to murder, forensic science is the only key to finding justice for the victims of a kidnapper's deadly intentions.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Sometimes, the cause of death does not match the scene of the crime. When an untraceable poison is used to commit murder, homicide detectives turn to forensic toxicologists to follow a killer's tracks and expose a toxic death.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Killers often attempt to deflect attention away from their crimes by hiding the remains of their victims. Bodies may lay hidden for years before they are discovered.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Forensic Entomology: Bugs have roamed the earth for 250 million years, but their intimate association with death is just now coming to life.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Drug trafficking has spawned a violent and deadly criminal underground. It's providing a challenge to forensic investigators devoted to cracking drug rings.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Toxicology: While drugs can cure disease and ease pain, they can also be agents of murder. Toxicologists can examine blood and tissue to uncover cases where death is not as natural as it may seem–from slow arsenic poisoning to quick cocaine overdoses.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: When killers are driven by jealousy and desire, their desperation is evident in both the crime and their efforts to avoid detection. But forensic science can reveal even the slightest mistake to solve crimes of passion.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: There are several things that can suggest murder; jealousy, anger, poison…When everyday substances reveal hidden clues that break a homicide case, those substances become the elements of murder.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Forensic psychologists delve into the minds of serial killers, explaining why, most often, they can be a friendly neighbor or the tenacious co-worker – the one who hides his or her dark side better than anyone else.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: When a murder is committed and deceit clouds the evidence, investigators turn to science and technology to uncover the truth and expose a murderous lie and capture the killer.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Investigators rely on forensic odontology to identify a body from a single tooth and to catch two brutal killers from their bite marks.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Young Mark McCain is eager to help lawman Jay Jefferson, who has arrived in North Fork intent on killing an outlaw for the reward, whether he is the right man or not.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas comes to the rescue when escaped convicts hold up the general store in North Fork and take Marshall Torrance hostage.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Young Mark manages to capture a hawk but falls into danger with a rattlesnake. A stranger comes to his rescue and Mark invites the man home, unaware that he is on the run from the law.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas takes in an orphaned teen being raised by his abusive uncle after there is trouble at the school.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: The McCains try to be tolerant of their embittered neighbor Abel MacDonald, but they decide he's gone too far when he won't allow his injured boy to get medical treatment.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: An unfounded rumor causes North Fork's outspoken feminist schoolteacher to be attacked by a mob of angry townspeople.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When his employer begins to suspect him of embezzlement, bookkeeper Asa Manning decides to hire a professional gunman to take care of the problem.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A drought has forced local cowhands to seek work on a railroad construction project, but executives are afraid workers will desert them if they believe an old man's claim of making rain.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas McCain gives blood to save a dying man and is surprised by Marshall Torrance's odd behavior towards him. Soon, men arrive from a nearby town and demand custody of the man.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When Mark finds of the body of a murder victim, Lucas, his friend Artemus and Marshall Torrance begin a search for the killer.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When renegade Apaches wound Lucas and kidnap Mark, Marshall Torrance joins with U.S. Marshall Sam Buckhart to form a rescue posse.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas is the town's representative to the railroad commission until an infamous train robber dies and leaves his ill-gotten wealth to Lucas. Lucas must clear his name.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When a rancher dies after the bank forecloses the mortgage on his property, his son blames the banker for his father's death.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When a wealthy rancher is killed, Mark suggests that they seek the aid of a mind reader to identify the murderer.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A group of outlaws devise a plan to get rid of Lucas so that they can take over the town of North Fork.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: After Lucas kills a mountain man in a brawl, his father arrives in North Fork to break his other boys out of jail and take revenge on Lucas and Marshall Torrance.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Newly arrived gunslinger Al Walker throws a mammoth party at the saloon, keeping acting Marshall Ben Waller busy until Lucas is forced to intervene.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: After Lucas accuses a newspaper writer's misleading articles of causing an innocent man's death, the writer begins writing articles about Lucas.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Gavin and Ezra Martin think that Lucas killed their son Clemmie while taking part in a train robbery and Lucas refuses to tell them what really happened.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Eddie's daughter causes trouble for Lucas when two strangers threaten her life after she arrives with criminal information and stolen money.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Town character Brett Conway blackmails Lucas with the knowledge that a young couple Lucas rescued is suffering from yellow fever.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas and Mark are stranded in the middle of a desert with very little food or water, and after Lucas is injured, Mark becomes the only hope for their survival.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: While trying to protect Banker Hamilton's gold, Mark is kidnapped and held hostage at the McCain ranch and will be killed within the hour unless Lucas cooperates.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas makes a life-or-death decision when Micah is held hostage and the kidnappers demand the release of a notorious outlaw.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas tries to do a good deed for the old town drunk but it backfires when the drunk's son believes he inherited Lucas' ranch.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A dance hall singer asks Lucas to care for her daughter in an effort to hide the baby from her self-righteous, bigoted father.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas becomes involved in a battle between an aspiring writer and a cocky, bragging trail boss.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Millicent Barnes sees her double at a bus terminal.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Paranoia strikes the residents of Maple Street when they believe human-looking aliens have invaded the neighborhood.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Businessman Arthur Curtis discovers that life as he knows it doesn't really exist.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Walter Jameson is an excellent history teacher who talks about the past as if he had lived it.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: When a space exploration crashes on Mars, the surviving passenger is surprised to find that Martians are human-looking, very friendly and apparently just like us...

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Just before being hanged for shooting a man in the back, a man in 1880 is transported into the year 1959 by a professor who soon realizes that he has brought forward a savage killer.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: An over-the-hill boxer gets a boost from one of his biggest fans - a little boy with an unwavering belief in magic.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: After being shot to death, Rocky Valentine encounters the amiable white-haired Mr. Pip, who gives Rocky everything he wishes for.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Schoolteacher Helen Foley finds a strange and very serious little girl on the stairs outside her apartment. The little girl seems to know her, and tries to jog her memory about a man she saw earlier that day. The man arrives at Helen's door…

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Riding home on the train one day, a man falls asleep and dreams it is 1880, and he is entering a small town called Willoughby.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A man, desperate to win the affection of a beautiful woman, slips her a love potion. He is overjoyed that the potion works so well...at first.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A trumpet player who's convinced he'll never amount to anything attempts suicide and finds himself in a world where no one can hear or see him.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: An eccentric loser gets a new life from his guardian angel, but there is a price to keeping it.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A woman discovers that the floor of a department store, on which she bought a gold thimble, doesn't exist - and that her 'saleslady' is really a mannequin!

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A scientist arranges to have his human-looking robot pitch for the struggling local baseball team.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A playwright makes characters come to life.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A pilot of a downed WW II bomber comes to in the African desert and desperately tries to find out what happened to the rest of his crew.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A luckless couple stumbles upon fortune when a genie materializes from a bottle in their antique shop. The genie grants them four wishes but warns them, prophetically, to be careful what you wish for.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Small time criminal Jackie Rhoades must face both his past and his conscience while waiting for his next assignment.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Bartlett Finchley's paranoia about the machines around proves true.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
